decks.notes: The main goal of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and efficient creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on aggressive creature-based strategies, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to apply pressure early on. The inclusion of burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt helps to clear a path for the creatures to attack. The deck also includes powerful support cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm to enhance the aggro strategy. Overall, the deck aims to win the game quickly through a combination of fast creatures and direct damage spells.

This deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast-paced strategy centered around artifact creatures and efficient mana acceleration. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and artifacts like Mishra's Bauble, the deck can quickly flood the board with threats such as Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Engineered Explosives provide additional utility and control options, while cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt disrupt opponents' plans. With a focus on synergy and aggressive plays, this Affinity deck seeks to outpace and overpower opponents before they can mount a defense.

This deck focuses on putting early pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. It also includes removal spells like Thraben Charm and Galvanic Discharge to control the board and protect its own threats. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos provide disruption and utility, while Ajani, Nacatl Pariah offers a powerful finisher. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently, using a combination of creatures, spells, and disruptors to secure victory.

The focus of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence through aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, supported by cards like Goblin Bombardment for additional damage. It also includes cards for removal like Fatal Push and Thraben Charm to control the opponent's board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah serves as a powerful finisher, while Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Voice of Victory provide additional synergy and card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and efficient card choices in a Mardu color scheme.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Amulet of Vigor and bounce lands like Simic Growth Chamber to cast Primeval Titan. The goal is to search for multiple Urza's Saga to tutor for important combo pieces like Scapeshift or Cultivator Colossus, allowing for explosive plays and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and lands. The inclusion of Malevolent Rumble and Aftermath Analyst offer additional removal and card advantage, while cards like Green Sun's Zenith provide flexibility in accessing key creatures when needed.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with creatures to enable the powerful "Living End" spell, which allows the player to return all creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield. This combo can be set up using cards like Street Wraith, Shardless Agent, and Endurance, while also utilizing disruptive spells like Force of Negation to protect the combo. The deck also includes various creatures with strong abilities to help control the board and win the game after resolving Living End, such as Colossal Skyturtle and Otawara, Soaring City.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly flood the board with cheap artifacts and creatures, utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Kappa Cannoneer to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy. The deck also includes cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke to control the board and disrupt the opponent while maintaining pressure with cards like Weapons Manufacturing and Urza's Saga. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature synergy and disruptive spells, making it difficult for the opponent to effectively respond to the aggressive strategy.

This Selesnya Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and disruption spells. The key strategy revolves around utilizing creatures with powerful enter-the-battlefield effects, such as Skyclave Apparition and Guide of Souls, to control the board while pressuring the opponent's life total. By combining aggressive creatures with cards like Solitude and Ephemerate for removal and protection, the deck aims to create a fast and resilient offense that can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to recover.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays while also utilizing blink effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your own creatures. By combining powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Solitude with cards like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to control the board and maintain pressure on the opponent. With a mix of removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize, as well as resilient creatures with blink abilities, the deck can adapt to various matchups and outmaneuver opponents through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to establish UrzaTron, a powerful mana-producing combination of Urza's Tower, Urza's Mine, and Urza's Power Plant, to quickly ramp into big plays such as Thought-Knot Seer and Karn, the Great Creator. Control elements such as Kozilek's Command and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms help to disrupt the opponent's game plan while Glaring Fleshraker and Sire of Seven Deaths provide threats on the board. The goal is to quickly establish dominance and control the game through powerful eldrazi creatures and versatile removal spells.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to quickly bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard. It also includes disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation to protect the combo. The deck aims to set up a quick and efficient reanimation strategy while controlling the opponent's moves, ultimately overwhelming them with powerful creatures and instant reanimation spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board. Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer provide card advantage and pressure, while Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt offer removal and reach. The deck also includes Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory for additional aggression and threat. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing the deck to consistently apply pressure and close out games efficiently.

The main concept of this deck is to efficiently control the game by leveraging the UrzaTron lands to ramp up mana quickly and cast powerful threat cards like Karn, the Great Creator, Ugin, Eye of the Storms, and Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Thought-Knot Seer and Dismember to disrupt opponents' strategies. Additionally, there are cards like All Is Dust and Chalice of the Void to further disrupt opponents' game plan. Overall, the deck aims to establish board control and overpower opponents with big threats while controlling the game state.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's mana base while consistently removing threats with spot removal spells. It also aims to generate card advantage through powerful card draw and recursion spells. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion enhances the deck's overall synergy and provides additional support. Overall, the deck seeks to control the game through resource denial and efficient removal, eventually overwhelming the opponent with its own threats and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with artifact creatures and using various artifact synergies to create a fast and aggressive playstyle. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to generate value and create a powerful board presence that can quickly close out the game. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Engineered Explosives and Pithing Needle allows for control over the opponent's strategies, while cards like Mox Opal and Arcbound Ravager provide additional support and versatility in combat situations.

The deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's plays through a combination of hand disruption, counter spells, and removal spells. It also utilizes card advantage and recursion with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Meticulous Archive. The key strategy is to out-value the opponent by efficiently removing threats and disrupting their game plan while maintaining card advantage. The win condition typically involves stabilizing the board and overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Quantum Riddler.
